title: Sami Punchline v2
goal: Rebuild Sami as a dry Späti oracle in the doorway, not a crime or gangster character.
camera: medium-wide doorway composition, Rico in foreground confused, Falk half leaving with keyring and green jacket continuity, Sami calm in doorway
must_have: plain dark hoodie with no text
Falk still has green jacket, scarf, man-bun and keyring
clean_prompt: Free-for-All Berlin Absurd Cartoon, thick black outlines, expressive but simple acting. In a broken Berlin room doorway, Sami appears as a tired Späti oracle: black beanie, plain dark hoodie without text, cheap blank coffee cup, half-closed eyes, calm deadpan face. Rico sits inside the room looking lost and confused, clean naive village boy with backpack and blue Tupperware nearby. Falk is half leaving in the background with green outdoor jacket, patterned scarf, thinning man-bun and large keyring, still friendly and slippery. No readable text anywhere, no labels, no posters, no logos, no caption bar. The joke comes from Sami's dry calmness and Rico's confusion.
negative_prompt: readable text, letters, words, logo, brand, poster text, wall sign, hoodie text, cup logo, caption bar, speech bubble, subtitle, infographic, form, police, weapon, gangster, threatening pose, crime drama lighting, villain shadow, photorealism, humanoid cat, horror mood
approval_checks: Sami reads as deadpan Späti oracle, not threat
Rico still reads naive and confused
no readable text in room or clothing
works as punchline shot after payment beat
